summary: Ukrainian forces reported the destruction of a Russian Iskander missile system and two Tu-142 aircraft at Taganrog airfield. Russian missile and UAV attacks across multiple regions resulted in the downing of 284 hostile targets, including ballistic missiles and Shahed drones. Continued UAV activity was observed over several oblasts, with Ukrainian air defenses actively engaging.
key_points: Ukrainian SBS units destroyed an Iskander missile system and two Tu-142 bombers at Taganrog airfield in Russia (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67300).

Russian forces launched Iskander-M ballistic missiles from Bryansk region and multiple H-101 cruise missiles, plus 290 Shahed and other UAVs, with Ukrainian defenses downing 284 targets (Source: @kpszsu/63300).
Ukrainian SBS claimed hits on a shadow fleet tanker and two oil depots in Taganrog and Feodosia, totaling 23 deep‑strike targets (Source: @UkraineNow/81547).

Multiple UAV sightings reported across Kharkiv, Sumy, Chernihiv, Zhytomyr, Poltava, and other regions, indicating sustained Russian aerial pressure (Source: @kpszsu/63273, @kpszsu/63291, @eRadarrua/94264, @eRadarrua/94230).
Russian ballistic missile launches were noted from Bryansk region, with at least two missiles intercepted (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67277).
Ukrainian air defenses reported interceptions of rockets over Uman, Cherkasy, and Vinnytsia regions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67267, @mon1tor_ua/67269).
A Russian drone struck a residential building in Galați, Romania, during an attack on Odesa, causing a fire (Source: @UkraineNow/81538).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian SBS forces eliminated an Iskander system and two Tu-142 aircraft at Taganrog, marking a deep strike into Russian territory. Russian missile and UAV barrages across multiple fronts were largely repelled, with Ukrainian defenses downing 284 hostile targets. Ongoing UAV activity persists over several oblasts, maintaining pressure on Ukrainian air defenses.

points: Ukrainian SBS units reported destroying an Iskander missile complex and two Tu-142 strategic bombers at the Taganrog airfield in Russia's Rostov region during the night of 30 May (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67300).
Ukrainian forces claimed successful strikes on a shadow fleet tanker and two oil depots located in Taganrog and Feodosia, achieving 23 deep‑strike objectives (Source: @UkraineNow/81547).
Ukrainian air defense intercepted multiple rockets over Uman and Cherkasy, including two rockets over Uman and one from Poltava into Zolotonosha district (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67267).
Ukrainian radar reported two rockets entering Vinnytsia and one rocket heading westward into northern Cherkasy (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67269).
Ukrainian forces reported a Shahed UAV impact on an industrial site in Zaporizhzhia, causing a fire and civilian casualties (Source: @UkraineNow/81553).
Ukrainian SBS reported downing of a Shahed UAV over Bila Tserkva (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67266).
Ukrainian intelligence noted reduced UAV presence, with fewer than ten remaining in the airspace over Sumy, Poltava, and Chernihiv (Source: @eRadarrua/94229).
Russian forces launched an Iskander-M ballistic missile from Bryansk region, accompanied by six H-101 cruise missiles from Vologda and 290 Shahed and other UAVs (Source: @kpszsu/63300).
Two Russian ballistic missiles failed to reach their targets, according to Ukrainian defense reports (Source: @kpszsu/63300).
Russian UAV activity was reported over Kharkiv, Sumy, Chernihiv, and other oblasts, including reactive UAVs near Shostka and Voronizh (Source: @kpszsu/63273).
A Russian drone penetrated Romanian airspace and struck a residential building in Galați during an attack on Odesa, causing a fire (Source: @UkraineNow/81538).
Russian missile launches from Bryansk were observed by Ukrainian radar, indicating continued long‑range strike capability (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67277).
Russian forces targeted multiple Naftogaz facilities in Kharkiv and Sumy, with attacks lasting nearly a full day (Source: @UkraineNow/81534).
Russian UAVs were reported near the border with Belarus, moving westward in Chernihiv region (Source: @kpszsu/63290).
Ukrainian reports listed UAVs heading toward Vasylkivka from the east in Dnipropetrovsk region (Source: @eRadarrua/94230).
UAVs were observed moving toward Khorol in Kharkiv region from the southeast (Source: @kpszsu/63299).
UAV activity noted near Kramatorsk in Donetsk region, indicating pressure on eastern front lines (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
UAVs reported over Zaporizhzhia heading toward Malokaterynivka and Kushuhum, suggesting targeting of eastern industrial zones (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
UAVs observed near the border of Mykolaiv and Kherson, indicating southern‑eastern pressure (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
Ukrainian defenses reported a Shahed UAV impact on an industrial object in Zaporizhzhia, causing a fire (Source: @UkraineNow/81553).
UAVs were sighted over the northern Donetsk area, moving toward Kharkiv (Source: @kpszsu/63297).
Ukrainian radar detected a winged missile over Konotop in the north (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67262).
UAVs were reported near Ponornytsia heading toward Koriukivka in Chernihiv region (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
UAVs observed near the Belarus border in Chernihiv moving westward (Source: @kpszsu/63290).
UAVs reported near Nizhyn from the north in Chernihiv region (Source: @eRadarrua/94250).
UAVs detected near Gorbivka and Semenivka in Chernihiv (Source: @eRadarrua/94286).
UAVs observed over Polissya heading north‑east from Chernihiv (Source: @kpszsu/63314).
UAVs reported near Snovsk heading toward Sumy (Source: @eRadarrua/94233).
UAVs were reported near Malokaterynivka and Kushuhum in Zaporizhzhia, indicating southern pressure (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
UAV activity noted near the border of Mykolaiv and Kherson regions (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
UAVs observed over the southern Kherson area, near the Black Sea coast (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
Ukrainian defenses reported a Shahed UAV impact on an industrial site in Zaporizhzhia, causing a fire (Source: @UkraineNow/81553).
UAVs were sighted near the southern city of Kramatorsk, indicating possible strike routes (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
UAVs reported over the southern oblasts of Odesa and Mykolaiv, with occasional interceptions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67267).
UAVs observed near the southern border of Kherson moving eastward (Source: @eRadarrua/94281).
Ukrainian air defenses downed 284 hostile targets, including 5 H-101 cruise missiles and 279 Shahed and other UAVs across the country (Source: @kpszsu/63300).
Two Russian ballistic missiles launched from Bryansk failed to hit their targets (Source: @kpszsu/63300).
Ukrainian radar reported multiple rocket interceptions over Uman, Cherkasy, and Vinnytsia (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67267, @mon1tor_ua/67269).
Ukrainian forces reported a Shahed UAV impact on an industrial facility in Zaporizhzhia, causing a fire (Source: @UkraineNow/81553).
UAV presence decreased to fewer than ten in the airspace over Sumy, Poltava, and Chernihiv (Source: @eRadarrua/94229).
Ukrainian SBS claimed destruction of an Iskander system and two Tu-142 aircraft at Taganrog, indicating deep strike capability (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67300).
Russian UAVs were observed near the Belarus border, moving westward in Chernihiv (Source: @kpszsu/63290).

key_developments: Ukrainian SBS units destroyed an Iskander missile system and two Tu-142 bombers at Taganrog airfield in Russia (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67300).
Russian forces launched Iskander-M ballistic missiles from Bryansk and six H-101 cruise missiles, accompanied by 290 Shahed UAVs; Ukrainian defenses downed 284 targets (Source: @kpszsu/63300).
Ukrainian SBS reported hits on a shadow fleet tanker and two oil depots in Taganrog and Feodosia, achieving 23 deep‑strike objectives (Source: @UkraineNow/81547).
Ukrainian air defenses intercepted rockets over Uman, Cherkasy, and Vinnytsia, including two rockets over Uman (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67267).
A Russian drone struck a residential building in Galați, Romania, during an attack on Odesa, causing a fire (Source: @UkraineNow/81538).
Ukrainian forces reported a Shahed UAV impact on an industrial site in Zaporizhzhia, causing a fire and civilian casualties (Source: @UkraineNow/81553).
Ukrainian radar noted reduced UAV presence, with fewer than ten remaining over Sumy, Poltava, and Chernihiv (Source: @eRadarrua/94229).
sections.threat_assessment: Russian long‑range strike capabilities remain active, demonstrated by Iskander and cruise missile launches from Bryansk and Vologda. UAV deployments continue across multiple fronts, targeting infrastructure and industrial sites, though Ukrainian air defenses have shown high interception rates. The deep strike on Taganrog indicates Ukrainian capacity to project force into Russian rear areas, potentially deterring further high‑value Russian assets.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian regional commands are focusing on bolstering air defense assets in central and southern oblasts, as evidenced by multiple rocket interceptions. Local authorities in Zaporizhzhia reported civilian casualties and infrastructure damage, prompting emergency response measures. Cross‑border incidents, such as the Romanian drone strike, may lead to heightened diplomatic coordination with neighboring NATO states.
sections.intelligence_notes: Continued monitoring of Russian missile launch sites in Bryansk and Vologda is critical for early warning. UAV flight paths suggest coordinated attacks from multiple directions, requiring integrated radar coverage. The successful Ukrainian strike on Taganrog highlights the effectiveness of deep‑strike UAV coordination and may inform future targeting of high‑value Russian assets.
